properties.name: Rosa Parks Boycott Route (1955)
properties.description: The route along Dexter Avenue from the Rosa Parks arrest site past Dexter Avenue Baptist Church to the Alabama State Capitol, central to the 381-day Montgomery Bus Boycott.

properties.name: Selma-to-Montgomery March Final Approach (1965)
properties.event: Selma to Montgomery Voting Rights March
properties.description: The final approach of the 54-mile Selma to Montgomery march along US Route 80, ending at the Alabama State Capitol on March 25, 1965, where Dr. King addressed 25,000 marchers.
